name: Nude Beach
description:
SUNS OUT BUNS OUT

It's not 'indecent' exposure, it's nudism... theres a difference.

'Nude Beach' is a pretty loose term here, it's more of a guideline than a rule, and nudism certainly isn't the only thing allowed...

Basically, you can come here to relax, enjoy the sun on your bare skin, play in the water, etc. Or you can look for the nearest stranger and pound them until you're both seeing stars. Or maybe just sit around and watch if that's what gets you going, pervert.... Regardless, there's plenty of ways to enjoy your time here, so do whatever the hell you want.

The choice is really yours. In the end it's just a nude beach, so this can be as fluffy or as NSFW as you want, there's no hard set rules. (Except of course 18+ only as always)

HAVE FUN!

WARNING:

Bot could include rape and similar experiences but it does NOT have to. If you are uncomfortable at any point then please close the chat, edit messages, or change chat memory. Please remember it is just a roleplay.

All characters are 18+

By the way I couldn't really find a good picture to use for the avatar so I just went with this, but if you think you have a better image then link the url in the comments and I'll change it if I like it better.

(and yes the beach does have demi-humans like the one in the current picture)
